title: Refined Enchanting
description: Level up your gear! Refined Enchanting adds RPG stats, tool badges, sleek tooltips, and a robust API for modders.
body:
# ✨ Refined Enchanting
**Stop rolling the dice. Start master-crafting.**

A polished Vanilla+ overhaul that replaces random enchanting with level-up gear growth, a ‘pick-your-power’ master-crafting system, and a modder-friendly API.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/68VbJE6sP2g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 📈 Level Up Your Gear
Your tools aren't static anymore. They gain **Experience (XP)** just by being used:
*   **Swords & Bows**: Gain XP by defeating mobs.
*   **Shields**: Gain XP by blocking attacks.
*   **Armor**: Gain XP by Dealing damage.
*   **Pickaxes & Shovels**: Gain XP by mining blocks.
*   **Axes**: Gain XP by chopping logs.
*   **Hoes**: Gain XP by Harvesting crops.
*   **Fishing Rods**: Gain XP by Fishing.

As your tool levels up, it unlocks the ability to hold more powerful enchantments.

---

## 💎 Pick Your Enchantments
Forget the random "spinning slot machine" of the old enchanting table. Refined Enchanting gives you control:

1.  **Open the Table**: Put your tool and some Lapis inside.
2.  **Pick Your Power**: You’ll see a list of every enchantment that tool can handle.
3.  **Pay the Price**: Each enchantment has a **Tool Level Requirement** and a **Lapis Cost**. 
4.  **No More Randomness**: If you meet the requirement, the enchantment is yours. No surprises.

---

## 🚀 How to Get Started
**Craft a tool** → **Use it to gain XP** → **Enchant once requirements are met.**

---

## 🛠️ For Modders & Pack Authors
We believe in empowering the community. Refined Enchanting features a robust, well-documented mod core:
*   **Data-Driven**: Customize XP weights, enchantment costs, and level-up rewards using standard JSON datapacks.
*   **Extensible Events**: Hook into every lifecycle stage, from XP gain to tool rendering overlays.
*   **[Official Wiki](https://github.com/BoboTweaks/Refined-Enchanting/wiki)**: Comprehensive guides for both players and developers.

---

### 🔗 Quick Links
*   **[GitHub Issues](https://github.com/BoboTweaks/Refined-Enchanting/issues)**: Found a bug? Let us know.
*   **[Modder Wiki](https://github.com/BoboTweaks/Refined-Enchanting/wiki)**: Build your own synergies.

**Whether you’re a player or a modder, Refined Enchanting gives you control, progression, and creativity.**
